---
title: "Chapter 13 Notes"
subtitle: "group_by() and summarize()"
author: "Katelyn Holdeman"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: true
---

# Loading Packages



# Counts, Center, and Spread



# count()



# summarize()



# group_by()



# Multiple Statistics



# Multiple Variables
